Notes

Speech-to-text: Speech recognition module for the Stanford Spezi health framework.

Text-to-speech: Speech synthesis module for the Stanford Spezi health framework.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of SpeziSpeech? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
